positive: detailed scene prompt with style, composition, lighting, color direction, and print-friendly details for a bold graphic t-shirt featuring a dynamic cityscape at sunset with palm trees and vibrant architecture against a bright blue sky
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, high motion blur, lens flares, chroma keying, post-processing effects, and any other texture that does not fit the style of apparel prints
